title: Add checks 3 and 4 to verify.py (shape overflow and text clipping)
description: Extend pypptx/ops/verify.py with check 3 (shape overflow) and check 4 (text clipping). Check 3 compares each shape's bounding box against slide dimensions with 50,000 EMU tolerance and also flags negative left or top values as overflow errors. Check 4 estimates rendered text height by summing font_size_emu * 1.35 * estimated_line_count across paragraphs, where line count uses word_wrap state and chars_per_line = box_width / (0.55 * font_size); warns at >8% overage and errors at >20% overage. Both checks skip table shapes and footer-region shapes (top > 90% of slide height).
acceptance_criteria: Check 3 reports ERROR when left+width > slide_width minus 50000 EMU tolerance
Check 3 reports ERROR when top+height > slide_height minus 50000 EMU tolerance
Check 3 reports ERROR when left or top is negative
Check 3 does not trigger when shapes are within bounds
Check 4 reports WARNING when estimated text height exceeds shape height by more than 8% but at most 20%
Check 4 reports ERROR when estimated text height exceeds shape height by more than 20%
Check 4 message includes estimated height, box height, and percentage overage
Check 4 skips footer-region shapes (top > 90% of slide height)
Check 4 does not trigger on shapes with no text
